required_preferences.fact: Switches to in-person coordination of her mother’s care logistics with her brother during his stay in Denver — handles appointments and paperwork collaboratively face-to-face rather than relying exclusively on a shared digital calendar.

supersedes.fact: Coordinates all medical appointments, prescription refills, and in-home care logistics for her mother — keeps a shared digital calendar with her brother for this purpose

required_preferences.fact: Keeps work devices on until after picking up her daughter from robotics club on club nights — checks messages and schedules post-6pm if needed on those evenings

supersedes.fact: Shuts down all work devices by 6pm when her daughter stays over — never checks messages after that hour

required_preferences.fact: Completes physical therapy routines daily at home, strictly follows her therapist’s instructions and logs progress in a notebook
Takes advantage of the wellness center trial by attending weekly meditation classes — previously had no structured meditation routine
Prefers texting over phone calls for casual conversations, but always calls family to discuss important matters
Spends Sunday afternoons reading nonfiction, never checks work emails during this time

persona: A freelance financial consultant with clients across multiple industries
